_comment_crosshost: Single host: leave the three keys below as-is. Cross-host (one realm across machines, §7): set bind to a reachable interface (your tailnet IP, or 0.0.0.0), advertiseHost to the address peers dial you at (your tailnet IP — required if bind is 0.0.0.0), and profile.discovery to tailscale. Same token on every machine = same realm.
